extensionDescription.message: Hide sensitive information on websites before sharing your screen.

commandStartSelection.message: Start selecting an area to hide

onboardingStep2.message: Click the part of the page you want to hide.

onboardingStep3.message: Choose how broadly the mask applies.

tagline.message: Hide sensitive information before you share your screen.

clearBtnNote.message: Saved masks stay saved and re-apply after a refresh or navigation.

statusUnsupportedPage.message: Cloakli can't run on this page.

statusTryNormalSite.message: Try again on a regular website.

selectionStarted.message: Selection mode started. It keeps running after you close this popup.

selectionPrompt.message: Click the area you want to hide on the page…

dispatchFailed.message:
Cloakli couldn't start on this page.
Reload the extension, then reopen the web page.

clearedTemporarilyPopup.message: Masks on this page are temporarily revealed.

licenseVisibilityToggleAria.message: Show or hide the license key

licenseDeactivateConfirm.message: Deactivate your Pro license on this device?

licenseErrServerNotConfigured.message: The license server address isn't configured yet.

licenseErrNetwork.message: Couldn't reach the server. Check your internet connection.

licenseErrInvalidResponse.message: Couldn't process the server response. Please try again later.

licenseErrInvalidLicense.message: This license key is not valid.

licenseErrProductMismatch.message: This license is not for Cloakli Pro.

licenseErrNotActive.message: This license is not currently usable. Please check your subscription status.

licenseErrStorageWrite.message: Could not save the activation. Please check your browser storage and try again.

licenseErrActivationLimit.message: This license has reached its device activation limit.

licenseErrRateLimited.message: Too many requests. Please try again in a moment.

licenseErrNoSession.message: No active license on this device.

licenseErrInvalidSession.message: Your license session has expired. Please activate again.

licenseErrInstanceDeactivated.message: This device's license has been deactivated.

licenseErrGeneric.message: Something went wrong with the license. Please try again later.

bannerFrozenSelection.message:
The page is frozen.
Click an area to hide it.
Press ESC to cancel.

bannerTooLarge.message: That area is too large. Please pick a smaller element.

bannerNoTargetAtPoint.message: Couldn't find an element at that spot. Try clicking somewhere else.

scopePickerTitle.message: Choose where to apply this mask.

scopeElementDesc.message:
Hides only the element you selected.
It may not re-apply if the page structure changes.

scopeElementDisabled.message:
Couldn't build a stable mask for this element.
Please select a different one.

scopePageLabel.message: Matching elements on this page type

scopePageDesc.message: Hides elements with the same role and structure on this page type.

scopeSiteDesc.message: Hides elements with the same role and structure across this site.

safetySelectorMissing.message: Couldn't build a stable mask rule.

safetySelectorTooLong.message: This structure is too complex to target reliably.

safetyTooGeneric.message: The selection is too broad, so it wasn't saved.

safetyTooManyMatches.message: The selection is too broad, so it wasn't saved.

safetyOriginalNotIncluded.message: The selected element isn't in the result, so this can't be used.

safetyCoversTooMuch.message: The selection covers too much of the screen, so it wasn't saved.

safetyMixedRole.message: Different kinds of elements are mixed together, so this can't be used.

freeLimitRules.message:
The Free plan can save up to 3 masks.
Delete an existing mask or upgrade to Pro.

freeLimitHostnames.message:
The Free plan can save masks on 1 site only.
Delete existing site masks or upgrade to Pro.

freeLimitScope.message:
Page-type and site-wide masks are Pro features.
The Free plan supports 'This element only'.

freeLimitGeneric.message: Couldn't save because of Free plan limits.

toastSavedPage.message: Saved $1 matching elements on this page type.

toastSavedSite.message: Saved matching-element masks across this site.

toastCoveredBySite.message: A site-wide mask already covers this, so it wasn't saved again.

toastSaveFailed.message:
Couldn't save this element.
The mask will only last on this page.

toastTooBroad.message:
The selection is too broad, so it wasn't saved.
Please select a more specific element.

toastClearedTemp.message:
Masks on this page are temporarily revealed.
They re-apply after a refresh or navigation.

toastRulesResynced.message: A saved mask was deleted, so this page was re-checked.

toastSitePaused.message: Masks on this site are paused.

toastSiteResumed.message: Masks on this site are resumed.

optionsEmpty.message:
No saved masks yet.

Open Cloakli on a web page and
click 'Select an area to hide' to add one.

optionsRiskWarning.message:
This mask was saved with an older format and may apply to multiple elements.
Please delete it and create it again.

optionsDeleteSite.message: Delete all masks for this site

optionsConfirmResetAll.message:
All saved Cloakli masks will be permanently deleted.
This cannot be undone.

Continue?

optionsRuleNotFound.message: Couldn't find that mask to delete. Refreshing the list.

optionsIntro.message: Review and delete saved masks per site. The actual text, names, emails, and images on web pages are never stored - only the CSS selectors needed to find elements again.

optionsResetAllDesc.message: The button below permanently deletes saved masks for all sites at once. This cannot be undone.

optionsDeleteRuleFailed.message: Couldn't delete the mask. Please try again.

licenseErrTooManyAttempts.message: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
